summary: Iteration 3 testing of CardCloud: Sport field + Tags, Watchlist CRUD + Acquire, User profile + avatar, CardCloud rebrand. Backend: 36/36 pytest passed (10 new iteration-3 cases added covering tag/sport filtering, /cards/tags aggregation, CSV import/export with sport+tags, watchlist CRUD, acquire flow, user isolation, profile PATCH, avatar upload). Frontend: Playwright verified login, CardCloud branding with cloud icon on login and header, nav (Vault/Watchlist/Profile), dashboard tag chip row + sport filter + sport badges on cards, CardFormModal has form-sport-select and form-tags-input, /watchlist add-watch-button + watch-form-modal + acquire-button + acquire-modal work end-to-end (watch item created, acquired, converted to card in vault, watch item removed), /profile has profile-name-input / upload-avatar-button / profile-save-button and name save works. All iteration 1 & 2 regressions still green.

issues: Recharts still emits benign width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial mount (from iteration 2, non-blocking)

action_items: Optional: wrap recharts ResponsiveContainer in a sized element to silence width(-1) warnings (carried over from iter 2)
Optional: split server.py (~950 lines) into auth_router / cards_router / watchlist_router / users_router for maintainability
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~950 lines (auth, cards, watchlist, users, files, storage proxy all in one). Strongly recommend splitting into feature routers now that iteration 3 added more surface area.
/api/cards/tags aggregation runs per request and unwinds the whole user's cards array. For large collections, add a compound index on (user_id, tags) or cache the result.

Acquire endpoint is not atomic: insert card then delete watch item are separate awaits. If the delete fails mid-way, the card is created but watch item remains. Consider wrapping in a Motor transaction or deleting first with a rollback compensator.
_norm_tags silently drops non-string values; if frontend ever sends numeric tag it becomes empty. Consider logging warning for dropped entries.

ProfileUpdate only supports 'name' — no way to clear picture/avatar_path. OK for now but should be documented; also PATCH ignores empty strings which prevents users from blanking fields by design (good).

Avatar upload reuses the same /files/{path} route — avatar_path files are user-owned so they're correctly protected, but note that if avatar_path is rotated the old file is not marked is_deleted (minor orphan accumulation).

GET /api/cards uses 'tags': tag (exact match) — good, but does not normalize the incoming tag to lowercase; a user passing ?tag=Rookie (capital) would return 0 results. Consider normalizing in the handler too, not only on write.
APP_NAME env defaults to 'cardcloud' in server.py but README/branding references should be verified (test_credentials.md still says 'CardVault').
test_credentials: demo@example.com / demo1234 (seeded, used for all auth-bound tests). NOTE: /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references 'CardVault' in the heading — consider updating to 'CardCloud'.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_I3_* and TEST_E2E_* data and clean up. Playwright also deletes TEST_E2E_Watch_Item card afterwards via API. No residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 36 backend tests pass and cover: auth (login/register/me/duplicate/invalid), cards CRUD + filters (q, year, status, tag, sport), /cards/tags aggregation, stats (with since variants), timeseries (default 12 + custom months), CSV export (checks for Purchased Date, Sold Date, Sport, Tags headers), CSV import (happy path + underscore headers + invalid-rows-skipped + non-csv-reject + sport/tags columns), image upload+serve, user isolation (cards + watchlist), quick-sell (default+explicit date+404), sport+tags create/update with normalization (lowercase+dedup), watchlist CRUD, watchlist acquire (creates card with inherited fields + deletes watch item), watchlist user isolation, PATCH /users/me, POST /users/me/avatar (verified avatar_path saved on user + served via /files). Frontend Playwright confirmed CardCloud brand+cloud logo on login & header, Vault/Watchlist/Profile nav, form-sport-select, form-tags-input, add-watch-button, watch-form-modal, acquire-button-*, acquire-modal, profile-name-input, upload-avatar-button, profile-save-button. Minor note: tag-chip click test used ambiguous selector prefix; manual screenshot confirms tag chips render (ROOKIE 2, CHIEFS 1, JA MORANT 1, GRIZZLIES 1) — clicking them should set active-tag-filter (not independently verified in automation, main agent can self-verify).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All iteration-3 features (sport/tags on cards, tag aggregation, tag/sport filters, CSV export/import columns, watchlist CRUD, acquire flow with watch-item deletion, profile PATCH, avatar upload, CardCloud rebrand with cloud icon in Login + SiteHeader) work as specified. Iteration 1 & 2 regressions green.
